status.constitutionalAuthorityStatementText:
[Congressional Record Volume 171, Number 120 (Monday, July 14, 2025)]
[House]
From the Congressional Record Online through the Government Publishing Office [www.gpo.gov]
By Mr. SHERMAN:
H.R. 4382.
Congress has the power to enact this legislation pursuant
to the following:
Article I, Section 8, clause 5, of the Constitution
empowers Congress to coin money.
[Page H3245]

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.

status.title: America’s Olympic and Paralympic Games Commemorative Coins Act
